title: A bold P letterform where the vertical stem extends full height — above and below the letter body. The extension says the governing rule is not limited to the letter: the principle runs through everything. The coral background is new to the active set; the full-height extended stem distinguishes this from 04-bold-p (bounded stem), 06-negative-p (amber, negative space), and 09-p-square-counter (square counter).
conceptualBridge: The extended-stem P means Precept's governing rule exceeds any single instance because the stem that supports the letterform continues beyond the P's body — the principle named in the letter is not bounded by it.
decision: Kept: 4.25 avg — the vivid coral palette and extended-stem form are genuinely new to the set; conceptual bridge at 3 (minimum) means this passes but doesn't convince — 'the rule extends beyond the letter' is too abstract; the form's distinctiveness is its strongest argument.
